raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent output names one prior work (CAMEL) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.",
    "R1.7": "The agent output flags some missing citations, but does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output presents all claims as equally confident, without marking uncertainty or confidence levels.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output mostly adheres to the scope of the task, with only minor drifts in some sections.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output is harm-free but introduces one minor regression (the 23% claim is not fully substantiated).",
    "RX.5": "The agent output does not provide clear provenance or traceability for its claims and suggestions."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.5,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent output names one prior work (CAMEL) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.
rationale.R1.7: The agent output flags some missing citations, but does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output presents all claims as equally confident, without marking uncertainty or confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output mostly adheres to the scope of the task, with only minor drifts in some sections.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output is harm-free but introduces one minor regression (the 23% claim is not fully substantiated).
rationale.RX.5: The agent output does not provide clear provenance or traceability for its claims and suggestions.
